{{Quote|Gray One, Gray Two, go evasive and stay that way.|"[[Gray Ten]]" [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="Conviction" />}}
'''Gray Two''' was the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] used by the second [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] of Gray Squadron or Gray Flight. Both [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] and [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadrons]] used these designations, and several individuals used the call sign Gray Two.

==History==
Approximately [[0 ABY/Legends|two months after]] the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]],<ref name="SW1">[[Star Wars (2013) 1|''Star Wars'' (2013) 1]]</ref> [[Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] covert [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighter]] [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]], [[Stealth Squadron|Gray Flight]], used the [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] Gray Two to refer to both the two-person [[Flight group/Legends|flight group]] of [[Rus Kal Kin]] and [[Falback Kord]], and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] as an individual.<ref name="SW4" />

The Rebel Alliance's [[Gray Squadron (Rebel Alliance)/Legends|Gray Squadron]] had [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|BTL Y-wing starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Telsij/Legends|Telsij]] as Gray Two during the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> with [[Karie Neth/Legends|Karie Neth]] as his [[Gunner/Legends|gunner]].<ref name="CCGKN">{{CCG|set=Death Star II Limited|cardname=Karie Neth}}</ref>

[[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] pilot [[Jesmin Ackbar]] flew as Gray Two in Wedge Antilles' [[Wraith Squadron|Gray Squadron]] prior to its adoption of its permanent designation, Wraith Squadron. Ackbar's squadronmate, [[Falynn Sandskimmer]], would also use the same call sign throughout the Wraiths' time posing as the crew of the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']], which was aligned with [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]. Flying its complement of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]], they adopted the designation of [[Gray Flight (New Republic)|Gray Flight]]. She participated in both the [[Battle of Talasea]] and [[Battle of Ession|Ession]] as Gray Two.<ref name="XWWS" />

A [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] pilot by the designation "Gray Two" flew as part of [[Gray Squadron (New Jedi Order)|Gray Squadron]] in the [[New Jedi Order]]'s [[StealthX wing]] during the [[Operation Shieldfall|battle]] on [[Nam Chorios/Legends|Nam Chorios]].<ref name="Conviction" />
